content.name: Pokey's Engine Mod Rebalance
content.description: Rebalances engine equipment mods into real choices. No roll RNG (every value pinned), four clear archetypes per tier (Interceptor, Dogfighter, Booster, Voyager), and forward thrust priced honestly so speed no longer wins every slot. Higher tiers always upgrade. Numbers only, savegame-safe. Weapon/shield/hull mods untouched.
content.author: Pokey

text.name: Pokey's Engine Mod Rebalance
text.description: Rebalances engine equipment mods into real choices. No roll RNG (every value pinned), four clear archetypes per tier (Interceptor, Dogfighter, Booster, Voyager), and forward thrust priced honestly so speed no longer wins every slot. Higher tiers always upgrade. Numbers only, savegame-safe. Weapon/shield/hull mods untouched.
text.author: Pokey
